form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr1) over 1700m at this track beaten 9 m by Lincoln Maree (2:03.30) in 3yo+ on March 5 at $25.60. At the start before 7th (Fr3) over 2200m at this track beaten 6 m by Commander Lincoln (2:45.10) in 3yo+ on February 19 at $17.80. Fitter now and may do better from the pegs.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up final bend and throughout the run home.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr1) over 2000m at Manawatu, beaten 12 m by I Can Too (2:26.80) on April 9 at $14.20. At his previous start 5th (Fr4) over 2000m at Manawatu, beaten 8 m by Brookies Player (2:27.00) in 3yo+ on April 7 at $46. Draws for a good showing.

At the start before 9th (Fr7) over 2200m at this track, beaten 15 m by Skys Legacy (2:42.00) in 3yo+ on March 19 at $12.70. One of the leading players on his best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay in and paced roughly rounding the first bend.
Checked shortly after the start by a breaking runner.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 2000m at Manawatu beaten 10 m by The Elite Athlete (2:28.60) on February 12 at $1.70. Looking for a strong return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: First up. At the last run she good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 2000m at Manawatu beaten 10 m by The Elite Athlete (2:28.60) on February 12 at $1.70. Looking for a strong return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up early in the run home.
Raced wide with cover from the 1000m.
Broke in the score up and out of position at the candy pole.
Hung inwards and struck a track marker when weakening final bend.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr1) over 2200m at this track, beaten 13 m by Bettor Reaction (2:39.40) in 4yo+ on April 10 at $52.60. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr6) over 2100m at Ruakaka, beaten 5 m by Commander Lincoln (2:47.30) in 3yo+ on April 6 at $3.30. This is winnable.
